descriptions.text: Zoku Mikagura Shoujo TanteidanпҪһKanketsu HenпҪһ is an adventure game that lets players enter into the mystic Taisho and early Showa periods and find out the truth behind each case. The number of scenarios has been increased largely and the вҖңinference triggerвҖқ feature is kept intact to deliver the most enjoyable detective game experience.

This is the continuation of Mikagura Shoujo Tanteidan. The events from the past will chase the members of the agency. Will they be able to outstand enemy's intrigues? And will be Tokito ready to find out the truth?
